english_text:
Intelligence
Knowledge
CONTAINER
RESTRAINT BIND
True reality of things
Flexible
FLEXIBLE
Not Flexible
Expands with knowledge
alt_text: Teaching diagram of al-'Aql (Intelligence) as a flexible green outer circle containing al-'Ilm (Knowledge) as a pink inner circle. Two labels point to 'Container' and 'Restraint/Bind'. A second diagram on the right shows that as 'Knowledge' grows, the 'Intelligence' container expands with it. A side panel labels three Arabic words (حاویۃ/container, إناء/vessel, صندوق/box) as 'Not Flexible' counter-examples.
notes: Pedagogical metaphor: intellect is a flexible container that grows with knowledge — unlike a rigid container.
